common.tagline: The dark marketplace for used games, accounts & gaming services.

home.heroSubtitle: Used games, gaming accounts, subscriptions, digital items and services - all in one dark marketplace.
home.officialStoreSubtitle: Curated products from our official store.
home.guaranteeSubtitle: Pick a guarantee package and let us hold the funds in escrow.
home.complianceWarning: Reselling gaming accounts, subscriptions or digital items may violate the rules of the original third-party platforms. By using this site you accept our terms.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Browse all marketplace categories.
categories.disabledNotice: This category is currently disabled by the admin.

product.complianceWarning: This category may include items whose resale violates third-party platform rules. Proceed at your own risk.

sell.title: Sell your item
sell.subtitle: Create a listing. It will be reviewed by our team before going public.
sell.successBody: Your listing is pending review by our team.

officialStore.title: Official Store
officialStore.subtitle: Products sold directly by the platform.

guarantee.title: Website Guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: Buy peace of mind. We hold the funds in escrow until you confirm delivery.
guarantee.howItWorksBody: 1) Buyer pays into escrow. 2) Seller delivers the item. 3) Buyer confirms. 4) Funds are released to the seller. If something goes wrong, our team mediates the dispute.

errors.exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a number.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

myListings.title: My listings
myListings.noListings: You haven't created any listings yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account info and language.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Open a support ticket and our team will get back to you.
support.subject: Subject

payments.title: Payment methods
payments.subtitle: Choose how you want to pay or receive payments.
payments.statusBody: Payments may be PENDING, AUTHORIZED, CAPTURED, FAILED or REFUNDED. For escrow orders, status moves through IN_ESCROW until the buyer confirms delivery.
payments.disclaimer: Payment gateway integration is a placeholder for this MVP. Real card processing requires Stripe / PayPal / a regional gateway. Do not enter real card data.
payments.adminToggleHint: Admins can enable / disable methods from the admin dashboard.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.complianceBody: Selling, sharing or transferring gaming accounts, subscriptions, in-game items or other digital goods may violate the terms of service of the original platforms (e.g. Steam, PlayStation Network, Xbox, Riot, EA, etc.). Sellers are solely responsible for ensuring that what they list is allowed to be transferred. The platform may remove any listing that appears to violate third-party rules.

validation.invalidPrice: Price must be a positive number.
